title: Business Strategy (parent)
notes: Initiative 29 P4 root. Parent topic for the 9 strategy artifacts under business-strategy/ folder + the POC_TO_COMMERCIAL_MAP CSV. Each child is registered separately; this row is the navigation entry point and the FK target for parent_topic on every child.

title: Market thesis (why now + structural shift)
notes: Initiative 29 P4. Why-now narrative; TAM/SAM/SOM bands; structural shift the company bets on; existing market structure; risks. Deck-bound: feeds slide 08 (Por que ahora).

title: Competitive landscape + positioning
notes: Initiative 29 P4. Three player categories (classic consulting, boutique agencies, pure SaaS); Holistica's diagonal positioning. Deck-bound: feeds slide 11 (Moat).

title: Pricing model (service + KiRBe SaaS + partner share)
notes: Initiative 29 P4. Three pricing surfaces: (a) service rate card by package; (b) KiRBe 3-tier hybrid + metered overage; (c) partner revenue-share schedule. Deck-bound: feeds slide 10 (Modelo de entrega).

title: Channel strategy (5 hypothesis cards)
notes: Initiative 29 P4. Five channels each as a testable hypothesis (founder-led, partner B2B, KiRBe inbound, public-site inbound, events). Deck-bound: feeds slide 09 (ICP) and slide 12 (Roadmap).

title: Sales motion (per-ICP discovery to close)
notes: Initiative 29 P4. Per-ICP stages (discovery -> qualification -> proposal -> close); cycle length + deal size bands; founder-led vs PLG split per ARR-band. Informational; deck-bound only in investor-variant. Primary owner is PMO (operator-fillable; founder authority remains in the artifact frontmatter).

title: Unit economics (LTV/CAC/payback)
notes: Initiative 29 P4. 2026 benchmarks (3:1 LTV:CAC SaaS target, 12-18mo payback, 2.0-2.9 sustainable for bootstrapped) + per-channel matrix. Deck-bound: feeds slide 12 (Roadmap).

title: Bootstrapping plan (runway + scenarios)
notes: Initiative 29 P4. Personal + business expense split; 3 scenarios (conservative/base/aggressive); 4-zone runway forecast (red/yellow/green/blue); break-even point per scenario. Deck-bound: feeds slide 12 (Roadmap) and slide 13 (Encaje ENISA, use of funds).

title: Investment thesis (if/when raise)
notes: Initiative 29 P4. Default posture: bootstrap. Amount band, milestones unlocked, dilution band, comparable rounds, alternatives (debt, ENISA loan, partner advance, customer prepay). Deck-bound: feeds slide 13 (Encaje ENISA). Primary owner is PMO (operator-fillable; founder authority remains in the artifact frontmatter).

title: Strategy decision log
notes: Initiative 29 P4. Cross-strategy decision log: id/date/scope/options/decision/rationale/revisit-trigger. Decisions made in other strategy artifacts are summarised here for chronological view.

title: POC to commercial map
notes: Initiative 29 P4. Each shipped Holistica delivery as a row: poc_id / delivery_name / partner_or_buyer_ref / domain / engagement_type / revenue_band / recurring / case_study_status. Deck-bound: feeds slide 06 (Tracción real).
